title: project — one outcome in one area
description: Quick errands are still projects — ones whose single action is the whole job. An open project with no open action is stalled: a validator warning and a standing query, never an error (OVERVIEW rule 2). 'Done is dated' (rule 4) — status 'done' requires the done date — is a cross-field rule enforced by tools/validate.py integrity_checks().

done_looks_like.description: A plain statement of what done looks like.

done.description: When the project was completed. Required when status is 'done'.
